title: update_space_fully description parameter encoding documented only in inline comment
description: The Option<Option<&str>> encoding for the description parameter (None=not in patch, Some(None)=set to NULL, Some(Some(s))=set to s) is documented via an inline code comment on the parameter line, not in the /// doc comment block. IDE hover and cargo doc will not show this encoding to future callers of update_space_fully. Fix: move the explanation into the function-level /// doc comment where it is surfaced by tooling. This is the one parameter in the function where correct usage is non-obvious without reading the source.
